response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments) and strong technical skills across multiple languages and domains, but his profile lacks direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. His recent work focuses on web, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure, with no mention of financial systems or Windows platform C++ development in a capital markets context. While he meets some technical requirements (C++, SQL, communication), his domain expertise is insufficient for the role.
strengths: Strong C++ development experience (National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Proficient in SQL and database management (MongoDB, MySQL)
Excellent communication and technical leadership (workshops, talks, open-source contributions)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains
Limited recent C++ work on Windows platform in a professional setting
Dominant focus on web/mobile/AI-agent development, with no relevant financial systems exposure

key_factors.factor: C++ Windows experience in financial domain
